name: command rg -n -i "human-only|human approval|human-approved|human approved|manual approval|manually approve|awaiting human|사람 승인|사람만|사람이 승인|수동 승인|수동으로.*승인|사용자 승인|human.*approve|approve.*human" README.md AGENT.md AGENTS.md CLAUDE.md skills src hooks .claude .codex docs/final-goal-gap-analysis.md docs/final-goal-phase-feature-spec.md hyohyeon-harness-최종목표.md --glob '!dist/**'; rg -n "approval|approve|승인|개입|decision|결정" README.md AGENT.md AGENTS.md CLAUDE.md skills/intent/SKILL.md skills/interview/SKILL.md skills/postmortem/SKILL.md skills/wiki/SKILL.md | sed -n '1,280p'
